'''Loran Llalik''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] and [[Doctor/Legends|doctor]] who lived on the [[planet]] [[Plavin 6]] with her family. Llalik's family included her husband, Doctor [[Nash Llalik]], and their three children: An [[Unidentified Llalik child|oldest son]], Doctor [[Nashiak Llalik]], and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agent [[Saren Llalik]].<ref name="AIR" />
